_note: Frozen ground truth for autotune — the metric, not the surface. DO NOT edit during a tuning run. 'expect' = the skill that must rank FIRST; 'expectNot' = skills that must never appear. set 'exam' mirrors exam.md §7 (keep green); set 'hard' are realistic paraphrases that AVOID the curated keywords (several fail at baseline — that's the loop's work).

cases.prompt: Create a PowerPoint pitch deck with 5 slides about the Nimbus service.
Open the spreadsheet in my downloads and add a column with computed totals.
I need to edit an existing Word document — add tracked changes and a comment.
Merge these two PDF files and add a watermark to every page.
Design a minimal poster as a PNG using good visual design philosophy.
Build a styled React dashboard landing page with a custom color theme.
Help me co-author a design doc / technical spec for the pricing API.
I have a rough half-formed idea — help me structure this into a proper prompt.
This is a complex multi-step task with dependencies — plan first, then execute.
Review this Go code for naming conventions and error handling style.
I want to create a new skill from scratch and run an eval to benchmark it.
Guide me on building MCP servers to integrate external services and APIs using the MCP SDK.
Run a Playwright browser test and screenshot the app's frontend.
Save this as a preference and remember my correction for future context.
Find where a function is defined and what calls it in this indexed repo.
Chain these two tool calls with a retry and fallback on failure.
The context window is filling up — do a handoff so a fresh agent can continue.
Show me some coding examples and explain memory learning.
Turn these meeting notes into something I can present to the board next week.
Leave a margin note and accept all the redlines in this contract.
Lay out a one-page event flyer image with nice typography.
My instructions to the model are vague — sharpen them into a clean ask.
Wire up a connector server so the assistant can reach our internal API.
Note my correction and keep it for next time I ask.
Save a curated knowledge-base page summarizing the launch.
I have a CSV of sales — pivot it and chart the monthly totals.
